hero.label: Quality Intelligence for Call Centers
hero.headline:
Every call evaluated.
Every insight delivered.
hero.subheadline: Transition from manual QA sampling to full AI-powered quality monitoring. Analyze 100% of your conversations with precision that matches your best auditors.

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.headline: Built for every team in your organization

items.title: Quality Assurance
items.description: Automate call evaluations using your existing grilles. Score every conversation consistently, surface coaching opportunities, and track agent performance over time.

items.title: Compliance & Risk
items.description: Monitor regulatory adherence across every interaction. Detect script deviations, flag non-compliant language, and generate audit-ready compliance reports automatically.

items.title: Sales Performance
items.description: Analyze commercial conversations to identify winning patterns. Track pitch compliance, measure conversion drivers, and replicate top-performer behaviors across your team.

items.title: Customer Intelligence
items.description: Extract actionable insights from the voice of your customers. Detect friction points, trending topics, and sentiment shifts to inform your product and marketing strategy.

platform.label: Platform
platform.headline: One platform, complete visibility
platform.description: A unified workspace where QA managers, compliance officers, and team leads collaborate on quality — from call ingestion to executive reporting.

items.title: Audio Upload
items.description: Batch or real-time call ingestion from any telephony system

items.title: AI Transcription
items.description: Multi-language transcription with speaker diarization

items.title: Third-Party Integration
items.description: Connect your existing recording platform via API

items.title: Evaluation Grilles
items.description: Custom scoring frameworks with weighted themes and items

items.title: Compliance Criteria
items.description: Severity-based compliance rules with automatic flagging

items.title: Evaluation Levels
items.description: Configurable scoring scales with color-coded performance tiers

items.title: LLM-Powered Analysis
items.description: AI models trained on your evaluation standards and calibrated to your team

items.title: Script Validation
items.description: Verify adherence to call scripts across every phase of the conversation

items.title: Prompt Calibration
items.description: Fine-tune AI evaluation prompts with side-by-side human comparison

items.title: Client Management
items.description: Multi-tenant workspace with client-specific grilles and scripts

items.title: Real-Time Monitoring
items.description: Live dashboard tracking evaluation progress and pipeline status

items.title: Statistics & Analytics
items.description: Agent performance trends, score distributions, and quality metrics

items.title: PDF Reports
items.description: Generate branded audit reports with detailed scoring breakdowns

items.title: Email Alerts
items.description: Automated notifications for critical findings and compliance breaches

items.title: Export & API
items.description: Export data to Excel, integrate with BI tools, or consume via REST API

features.label: Why Choose Us
features.headline:
The precision of your best auditor,
at the scale of your entire operation

items.title: 100% Call Coverage
items.description: Stop sampling 2-3% of calls. Evaluate every single conversation with consistent, auditable criteria.

items.title: Your Grilles, Your Rules
items.description: We adapt to your evaluation methodology — not the other way around. Import your existing scoring frameworks.

items.title: Human-in-the-Loop
items.description: AI handles the volume. Your team handles the judgment calls. Review, calibrate, and approve at every step.

items.title: Audit-Ready Compliance
items.description: Every evaluation is traceable, timestamped, and exportable. Ready for regulatory audits at any moment.

items.title: Multi-Industry
items.description: Energy, telecom, insurance, banking — our platform adapts to the compliance requirements of your industry.

items.title: Secure by Design
items.description: Data encryption at rest and in transit. Role-based access control. GDPR-compliant data handling.

items.title: Evaluation Dashboard
items.description: Real-time overview of all evaluations, scores, and compliance status

items.title: Grille Editor
items.description: Build and customize evaluation grilles with weighted scoring

items.title: AI Analysis
items.description: Watch the AI evaluate a call against your criteria in real time

demo.label: Get Started
demo.headline: Ready to transform your QA process?
demo.description: Send us a sample recording and your evaluation criteria. We will return a fully scored audit within 24 hours — no commitment required.
demo.successMessage: Thank you. We will be in touch within 24 hours.

fields.label: Tell us about your QA challenges
